answer: The Markdown frontmatter canary showed a metadata extraction success rate issue in md_frontmatter_ingest_v1 because the concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index Markdown, so it fell back to body_text_only instead of yaml_frontmatter; the fix is to enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files, and validation is marked by concept-fm-canary-pass.

facts.remediation: enable parsing of YAML frontmatter on non-index Markdown files
facts.root_cause: concept frontmatter parser skipped non-index markdown
